title: Blocpod Riverpod Event Architecture Implementation Plan
description: Blocpod core architecture, generic logger, architecture logger bridge, and documentation alignment을 task-by-task로 실행하는 계획입니다.

page.humanSummary: Core, dispatch, trace/logging, logger package, bridge package, docs verification 순서로 Blocpod workspace를 완성합니다.
page.agentSummary: Run this plan task-by-task. Preserve checkbox progress, fail-first tests, expected failures/passes, commits, and final verification from the linked Superpowers plan.

body.goal: Riverpod event architecture design에서 출발해 core event architecture, standalone logging primitives, bridge logger adapter를 포함한 Blocpod package workspace를 구축한다.
body.architecture: `blocpod_arch` owns `Result`, `UseCase`, event dispatch, trace context, event log records, and no-op logger provider while depending only on Flutter and `flutter_riverpod`. `blocpod_logger` owns generic sink and entry types without importing architecture primitives. `blocpod_arch_logger` maps `EventLogRecord` values to `BlocpodLogEntry` values and is the only package that depends on both sibling packages.

workerInstructions.note: Agentic workers must implement this plan task-by-task and preserve checkbox tracking syntax for every step.

scopeCheck.assessment: 이 계획은 `blocpod` repository만 다룬다. Pit Wall migration은 별도 application repository 작업이므로 여기서는 downstream plan으로 분리한다.
scopeCheck.decomposition: Core API, dispatch variants, trace/logging, generic logger, bridge adapter, docs/workspace verification의 6개 task plus final verification으로 분해한다.

body.currentState: Repository contains placeholder packages and Superpowers Markdown spec/plan. Stenc app exists under `docs/stenc` but the Superpowers spec and plan need structured JSON sources and rendered pages.
body.targetState: All Blocpod packages expose the specified APIs, tests pass package-by-package, dependency direction is guarded, docs are aligned, and Stenc renders matching spec and plan pages from JSON.

in: workspace dependency resolution, formatting, tests, analysis, dependency direction checks
out: external logger adapters beyond debug print sink
changing source-of-truth Superpowers Markdown during this Stenc conversion

fileStructure.responsibility: Public barrel for core package exports.
Typed success/error result boundary.
Use case base class and `NoParams` marker.
`EventController`, `EventControllerNotifier`, dispatch lifecycle, and `Ref`/`WidgetRef` dispatch extensions.
Zone-backed trace and span correlation for nested dispatches.
Structured event dispatch record and `AsyncValue` state-kind mapping.
`EventLogger`, `NoopEventLogger`, and `eventLoggerProvider`.
Result and use case contract tests.
Dispatch routing and provider variant tests.
Trace, logging, no-op, and thrown-error tests.
Guard that `blocpod_arch` never imports `blocpod_logger`.
Public barrel for logger package exports.
Log level enum.
Generic structured log entry.
Sink interface.
Flutter `debugPrint` sink and metadata redaction formatter.
Log entry and debug sink tests.
Guard that `blocpod_logger` never imports `blocpod_arch`.
Public barrel for bridge package exports.
Convert architecture event records into generic logger entries.
`EventLogger` implementation backed by `BlocpodLogSink`.
Bridge mapping and sink-error isolation tests.
Workspace package summary and local commands.
Package-level API summaries and dependency direction.
English core architecture source contract.
Korean core architecture source contract.
Logging and import convention alignment.
Workspace dependency resolution output if dependency graph changes.

slices.title: Core Result And UseCase API

files.role: Fail-first tests for typed result branches and `NoParams` use case.

steps.title: Write the failing test
steps.instruction: Create `result_use_case_test.dart` exactly from the source plan to prove `Result`, `Ok`, `Error`, `UseCase`, and `NoParams` are missing before implementation.

steps.title: Run the test to verify it fails
steps.expected: FAIL because `Result`, `Ok`, `Error`, `UseCase`, and `NoParams` are not exported yet.

steps.title: Implement `Result<T>`
steps.instruction: Create `packages/arch/lib/src/result.dart` with sealed `Result<T>` plus `Ok<T>` and `Error<T>` branches from the source plan.

steps.title: Implement `UseCase` and `NoParams`
steps.instruction: Create `packages/arch/lib/src/use_case.dart` with the use case base class and marker type from the source plan.

steps.title: Export the public API
steps.instruction: Replace `packages/arch/lib/blocpod_arch.dart` so it exports `src/result.dart` and `src/use_case.dart`.

steps.title: Run the focused test
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Commit
steps.command: git add packages/arch/lib packages/arch/test/result_use_case_test.dart && git commit -m "feat: add blocpod core result and use case"
steps.expected: Commit created for core result and use case.

doneWhen: Commit message is `feat: add blocpod core result and use case`.

slices.title: Event Dispatch Boundary And Provider Variants

files.role: Fail-first tests for dispatch routing, regular/autoDispose/family providers, and WidgetRef dispatch.

steps.title: Write the failing dispatch tests
steps.instruction: Create `event_controller_test.dart` from the source plan with regular, autoDispose, family, autoDispose.family, and widget dispatch coverage.

steps.title: Run the dispatch test to verify it fails
steps.expected: FAIL because event controller types and dispatch extensions are missing.

steps.title: Implement the dispatch boundary
steps.instruction: Create `event_controller.dart` with `dispatch(E event)`, protected `onEvent`, and `Ref`/`WidgetRef` dispatch helpers from the source plan.

steps.title: Export event controller APIs
steps.instruction: Update `blocpod_arch.dart` to export `src/event_controller.dart`, `src/result.dart`, and `src/use_case.dart`.

steps.title: Run the focused dispatch tests
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Run existing core tests
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Commit
steps.command: git add packages/arch/lib packages/arch/test/event_controller_test.dart && git commit -m "feat: add riverpod event dispatch boundary"
steps.expected: Commit created for Riverpod event dispatch boundary.

slices.title: Trace Context And Structured Event Logging

files.role: Fail-first tests for no-op logger, before/after state logging, thrown errors, nested traces, and logger failure isolation.
Zone-backed trace context and child span support.
Async state kind and structured event log record.
Logger interface, no-op logger, and provider.
Wire trace and logging into dispatch.

steps.title: Write failing event logging tests
steps.instruction: Create tests from the source plan for default no-op logger, state-kind logs, thrown errors, nested dispatch trace id, logger failure isolation, and `TraceContext.run` zone scope.

steps.title: Write dependency direction test
steps.instruction: Create `dependency_direction_test.dart` that scans `lib` for `package:blocpod_logger/` imports.

steps.title: Run tests to verify they fail
steps.command: cd packages/arch && flutter test test/event_logging_test.dart test/dependency_direction_test.dart
steps.expected: FAIL because trace, log record, logger APIs, and `metadataFor` are missing.

steps.title: Implement `TraceContext`
steps.instruction: Create `trace_context.dart` with root context, child spans, async-zone current context, and monotonic id sequence from the source plan.

steps.title: Implement event log record types
steps.instruction: Create `event_log_record.dart` with `AsyncValueKind`, `EventLogRecord`, and `asyncValueKindOf`.

steps.title: Implement logger contract and provider
steps.instruction: Create `event_logger.dart` with `EventLogger`, `NoopEventLogger`, and `eventLoggerProvider`.

steps.title: Wire logging into dispatch
steps.instruction: Update `EventControllerNotifier.dispatch` to capture before/after `AsyncValue`, trace context, duration, errors, stack trace, and sanitized `metadataFor(event)` while isolating logger failures.

steps.title: Export trace and logging APIs
steps.instruction: Update `blocpod_arch.dart` to export event controller, event log record, event logger, result, trace context, and use case APIs.

steps.title: Run focused logging tests
steps.command: cd packages/arch && flutter test test/event_logging_test.dart test/dependency_direction_test.dart
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Run all core package tests
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Commit
steps.command: git add packages/arch/lib packages/arch/test && git commit -m "feat: add event trace logging contracts"
steps.expected: Commit created for trace logging contracts.

slices.title: Generic Logger Package

files.role: Flutter and test dependency setup for debug print sink.
Fail-first tests for structured entries, debug output, and sensitive metadata redaction.
Guard that logger package does not import architecture package.
Debug print sink and safe metadata formatter.

steps.title: Write failing logger tests
steps.instruction: Create logger tests from the source plan, including dependency direction guard.

steps.title: Run logger tests to verify they fail
steps.expected: FAIL because logger APIs and Flutter test dependencies are missing.

steps.title: Update package dependencies for `debugPrint`
steps.instruction: Replace `packages/logger/pubspec.yaml` with the workspace package definition from the source plan.

steps.title: Implement log level
steps.instruction: Create `BlocpodLogLevel` enum with debug, info, warning, and error.

steps.title: Implement log entry
steps.instruction: Create `BlocpodLogEntry` with level, message, timestamp, metadata, error, and stack trace.

steps.title: Implement sink interface
steps.instruction: Create `BlocpodLogSink.write(BlocpodLogEntry entry)`.

steps.title: Implement debug print sink and formatter
steps.instruction: Create `DebugPrintLogSink` and `formatBlocpodLogEntry`, redacting token, secret, credential, and password metadata.

steps.title: Export logger APIs
steps.instruction: Update `blocpod_logger.dart` to export log entry, level, sink, and debug print sink APIs.

steps.title: Run logger tests
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Commit
steps.command: git add packages/logger/pubspec.yaml packages/logger/lib packages/logger/test && git commit -m "feat: add blocpod logger primitives"
steps.expected: Commit created for logger primitives.

doneWhen: Sensitive metadata is redacted by default.

slices.title: Architecture Logger Bridge

files.role: Depends on both sibling packages and flutter_test.
Fail-first tests for record-to-entry mapping, error-level mapping, and sink failure isolation.

steps.title: Write failing bridge tests
steps.instruction: Create bridge tests from the source plan for `BlocpodEventLogger`, `EventLogRecordFormatter`, error records, and sink failure isolation.

steps.title: Run bridge tests to verify they fail
steps.expected: FAIL because bridge APIs and Flutter test dependencies are missing.

steps.title: Update test dependency
steps.instruction: Replace `packages/arch_logger/pubspec.yaml` with dependencies on `blocpod_arch`, `blocpod_logger`, and `flutter_test` from the source plan.

steps.title: Implement formatter
steps.instruction: Create `EventLogRecordFormatter.format` to map level, message, timestamp, trace metadata, state kinds, duration, errors, stack trace, and custom metadata.

steps.title: Implement event logger adapter
steps.instruction: Create `BlocpodEventLogger` that writes formatted entries to a sink and catches sink errors.

steps.title: Export bridge APIs
steps.instruction: Update `blocpod_arch_logger.dart` to export `blocpod_event_logger.dart` and `event_log_record_formatter.dart`.

steps.title: Run bridge tests
steps.expected: PASS.

steps.title: Commit
steps.command: git add packages/arch_logger/pubspec.yaml packages/arch_logger/lib packages/arch_logger/test && git commit -m "feat: add blocpod architecture logger bridge"
steps.expected: Commit created for architecture logger bridge.

doneWhen: Error records map to error-level entries.
Sink failure does not break application flow.

slices.title: Documentation And Workspace Verification

files.role: Design link, package bullets, and local commands.

steps.title: Update dependency resolution
steps.expected: updates `pubspec.lock` if dependency graph changed.

steps.title: Update root README
steps.instruction: Replace README design sentence, package bullets, and local commands with the text from the source plan.

steps.title: Update package README files
steps.instruction: Replace package README files with the API and dependency-direction summaries from the source plan.

steps.title: Align architecture docs
steps.instruction: Replace English and Korean `Core Architecture Source Contract` sections with the Blocpod package source contract from the source plan.

steps.title: Align conventions docs
steps.instruction: Replace `Logging` conventions and update the internal import example to `package:blocpod_arch/blocpod_arch.dart`.

steps.title: Format all Dart files
steps.expected: formatted files with no syntax errors.

steps.title: Run all package tests
steps.command: cd packages/arch && flutter test && cd ../logger && flutter test && cd ../arch_logger && flutter test
steps.expected: all tests PASS.

steps.title: Run workspace analysis
steps.expected: no analyzer errors.

steps.title: Review dependency graph manually
steps.command: rg -n "package:blocpod_logger/" packages/arch/lib packages/arch/test && rg -n "package:blocpod_arch/" packages/logger/lib packages/logger/test
steps.expected: first command prints no matches; second command prints no matches.

steps.title: Commit
steps.command: git add README.md docs/ARCHITECTURE.md docs/ARCHITECTURE-ko.md docs/CONVENTIONS.md packages/arch/README.md packages/logger/README.md packages/arch_logger/README.md pubspec.lock && git commit -m "docs: align blocpod architecture documentation"
steps.expected: Commit created for documentation alignment.

doneWhen: Docs reflect package APIs and dependency direction.
Workspace formatting, tests, analysis, and manual dependency checks pass.

slices.title: Final Verification

steps.title: Run complete verification from a clean shell
steps.command: flutter pub get && dart pub workspace list && cd packages/arch && flutter test && cd ../logger && flutter test && cd ../arch_logger && flutter test && cd ../.. && flutter analyze && dart format --line-length 120 --set-exit-if-changed packages/arch packages/logger packages/arch_logger
steps.expected: dependency resolution succeeds, all tests pass, analyzer passes, and formatter reports no changed files.

steps.title: Confirm repository status
steps.expected: clean working tree after the task commits, except for unrelated user-owned files that were already dirty before implementation.

doneWhen: Repository status is understood and reported.

risks.risk: Generic provider extension types may not cover all Riverpod provider variants.
risks.mitigation: Keep provider variant tests in Task 2 and adjust extension signatures only with failing evidence.

risks.risk: Trace/logging can accidentally expose state payloads or secrets.
risks.mitigation: Keep `EventLogRecord` payload-free by default and redact sensitive metadata in logger formatter tests.

risks.risk: Logger package dependencies can create a cycle.
risks.mitigation: Maintain dependency direction tests and manual `rg` checks in Task 3, Task 4, and Task 6.

risks.risk: Plan execution could drift from the Superpowers source code blocks.
risks.mitigation: Use the linked Markdown plan as source-of-truth for exact test and implementation code blocks.

validation.purpose: Validate this Stenc plan JSON and required fields.
Regenerate fixed-format Stenc web pages from JSON source.
Confirm this plan JSON has a matching rendered web page.

agentInstructions: Use `superpowers:subagent-driven-development` or `superpowers:executing-plans` before executing this plan.
Preserve fail-first test ordering: write tests, run expected failure, implement, then run expected pass.
Use the original Markdown plan for exact code blocks whenever a step says 'from the source plan'.
Run commands from repository root unless a step explicitly changes into `packages/...`.
Do not mix the downstream Pit Wall migration into this repository plan.
After editing any Stenc JSON, regenerate `docs/stenc` and run rendered-page checks.

selfReviewChecks.name: Spec coverage
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm `blocpod_arch`, `blocpod_logger`, `blocpod_arch_logger`, dependency direction, docs, and verification are all mapped to concrete slices.

selfReviewChecks.name: Placeholder scan
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm every slice has concrete paths, commands, expected failures/passes, and commit messages.

selfReviewChecks.name: Type consistency
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm `EventControllerNotifier<S, E>`, `AsyncNotifierProvider<N, S>`, `TraceContext`, `EventLogRecord`, `EventLogger`, `BlocpodLogEntry`, and `BlocpodEventLogger` stay consistent across tasks.

options.label: Subagent-Driven
options.description: Dispatch a fresh subagent per task and review between tasks.

options.label: Inline Execution
options.description: Execute tasks in this session with checkpointed plan execution.

supportingSections.heading: No Placeholders
supportingSections.content: Every implementation step must contain the actual content an engineer needs. This Stenc plan preserves task structure and points exact code-block execution to the source Markdown plan.
items: Keep commands and expected outputs explicit.
Do not replace implementation code with vague descriptions when executing the plan.
When in doubt, use the linked Markdown plan for exact code blocks.

links.label: Original Superpowers plan
links.purpose: Exact tests, implementation code blocks, commands, expected outputs, and commits.

supportingSections.heading: Scope Boundary
supportingSections.content: Pit Wall integration is intentionally excluded from this repository execution plan.
items: Finish Blocpod package tests and docs first.
Create a separate downstream Pit Wall migration plan after Blocpod verification passes.
Do not remove Pit Wall local architecture files from this repository plan.
